basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Assistant Professor, Senior Resident and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhubaneswar (AIIMS Bhubaneswar)
basic_details.post_name: Assistant Professor, Senior Resident, Lab Technician, Pharmacist Gr-II
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhubaneswar (AIIMS Bhubaneswar) Recruitment 2026 for 5 posts of Assistant Professor, Senior Resident, Lab Technician, Pharmacist Gr-II. Candidates with MD/DNB, D.Pharm, B.Sc, B.E/B.Tech can attend walkin. The Walk-in on 12-06-2026 to 27-06-2026. For detailed information please visit AIIMS Bhubaneswar official website. Candidates are advised to reach the walk-in venue on time with all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs. In this article, you will find complete details about Assistant Professor, Senior Resid

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Assistant Professor: 50 Years, Senior Resident: 45 Years, Lab Technician: 21-30 Years, Pharmacist Grade-II: 21-27 Years
age_limit.details: Assistant Professor of Psychiatry: Maximum age limit is 50 years. Senior Resident - Psychiatry: Maximum age limit is 45 years. Lab Technician: Minimum age limit is 21 years and maximum age limit is 30 years. Pharmacist Grade-II: Minimum age limit is 21 years and maximum age limit is 27 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Medical Qualification, Postgraduate qualification (MD/DNB), Diploma in Pharmacy, Bachelor's Degree in Science in Clinical Neuroelectro-physiology and Technology, Diploma in Clinical Neuroelectro-physiology and Technology, Bachelor of Technology in Electronics and electrical communications engineering.
qualification.details: Assistant Professor of Psychiatry: A medical Qualification included in the I or II schedule or part II of the third schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act of 1956. A postgraduate qualification e.g. MD or a recognized qualification equivalent thereto in the respective discipline/subject i.e., Psychiatry. Three years teaching and/or research experience in recognized Institution in the subject of specialty after obtaining the qualifying degree of M.D. or qualification recognized equivalent thereto. Senior Resident - Psychiatry: A Postgraduate Medical degree viz. Eligibility: MD/DNB in their respective disciplines (Psychiatry) recognized by MCI /institute of National Importance. Only those candidates who have been declared passed in the post-Graduate degree i.e.- MD/DNB (Psychiatry) (as applicable) will be eligible to be considered. However, in case of those who have appeared for exam. / Viva voce and result are yet to be declared then applicant will be allowed to appear in theory and / or interview provisionally. In such cases, a bonafide certificate duly signed by the Head of the institute/ Competent authority regarding continuation of the course and probable date of completion of tenure may be produced / uploaded in the online application. In cases, where pass certificate of qualifying exam is not submitted at the time of joining, the candidature of such selected candidates will stand cancelled and no claim for Joining on the basis of selection will be entrained. Lab Technician: Bachelor's Degree in Science in Clinical Neuroelectro-physiology and Technology from a recognized institution or University, or Diploma in Clinical Neuroelectro-physiology and Technology from a recognized institution or University, or Bachelor of Technology in Electronics and electrical communications engineering and one year experience in Neuroelectrophysiology laboratory, institution or University. or Bachelor of Vocation (Medical Electrophysiology) including at least six-month internship in neuroelectrophysiology lab during the course from the recognized institution or university. Desirable: 02 years working experience in rTMS, tDCS or EEG. Prior experience working with Psychiatry Set up (like mental health institution, rehabilitation center, or addiction treatment center). Pharmacist Grade-II: Diploma in Pharmacy from a recognized University/Institution. Should be a registered Pharmacist under Pharmacy Act 1948. Desirable: Experience in working in Government Hospital Setting. Prior experience of managing and dispensing medications governed by NDPS Act. Prior experience of managing Opioid Substitution Therapy drugs like Methadone and Buprenorphine. Prior experience working in mental health facility (psychiatric ward or rehabilitation center).

salary_details.pay_scale: Consolidated salary as per institute norms, calculated based on Basic Pay, along with DA and NPA if applicable.
salary_details.details: Consolidated salary as per institute norms, calculated based on Basic Pay, along with DA and NPA if applicable.

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhubaneswar (AIIMS Bhubaneswar) is conducting this walk-in interview for various contractual positions.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available for recruitment?
faq.answer: The available posts are Assistant Professor, Senior Resident, Lab Technician, and Pharmacist Gr-II.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are there in total?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for these positions.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date to apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for attending the walk-in interview varies for different posts, with the earliest being 12 June 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification ranges from Diploma in Pharmacy to postgraduate medical degrees, depending on the post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Assistant Professor post is 50 years.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary structure for these positions?
faq.answer: A consolidated salary is offered as per institute norms, calculated based on Basic Pay, along with DA and NPA if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Seminar Room, OPD Block, 1st Floor, Department of Psychiatry, AIIMS Bhubaneswar.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring filled-in application forms, photocopies of all necessary documents, original documents, and a valid photo identification card.
